race.description: Charcoal Inn And Bottleshop Super Showcase Mdn
race.comment: DELLUCY (8) looks to find her race today and is proven in the conditions. Out of her depth when twelfth to Rustemo over 1300m at Scone in a Super Maiden. Assess on the narrow second-two-back. Respect. FLYING AKEED (1) former Hong Kong-trained gelding who resumed with a respectable fourth over 1150m at the Gold Coast Poly. Maps well here and will keep improving as he gets out in trip. MYSTICAL GEM (14) resumes and is now in the Allan Chau stable. Finished off last campaign with a slashing fourth over 1000m at Pakenham on March 12. Fitted with a slick 1050m trial win at the Gold Coast Poly. Leading contender. MISS DIPSEY (12) is a first-starter by Russian Revolution out of Monistique from the Leo Clapham yard. Placed in a recent 940m trial in the heavy going. Keep safe from the good barrier.
